description: The Harbour Master has issued Notice to Mariners No. 12/2026 regarding changes to the Solent buoyage. Update the Bridge Command simulator database to reflect these changes by creating a new world revision at /opt/bridgecommand/World/Solent_v2026 (named 'Solent v2026 (Updated)') based on the existing 'Solent' world. Using the information in /home/ga/Documents/NTM_12_26.txt, relocate the 'Horse Sand' buoy and its light to the new position and add the specified 'Wreck' buoy. Ensure all configuration files in the new world directory are updated correctly to reflect these changes, using decimal degrees for coordinates.
